name: SYNAPTICS Inc
summary: Synaptics Incorporated designs and delivers AI-enabled edge semiconductor solutions including touch, display, biometrics, wireless connectivity, and processor products. The company offers the Astra family of edge AI processors, Veros wireless connectivity solutions (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, BLE, Zigbee, Thread, Matter, UWB, GPS/GNSS), Natural ID fingerprint products, DisplayLink/DisplayPort video interface solutions, and automotive touch/display technologies. Synaptics serves OEMs across IoT, PC, mobile, enterprise, and automotive markets operating as a fabless semiconductor company.

products.name: Synaptics Astra
products.description: AI-native edge processor family including MPU and MCU solutions with AI/ML toolkits for IoT applications.

products.name: Veros
products.description: Wireless connectivity solutions supporting Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, BLE, Zigbee, Thread, Matter, UWB, GPS, GNSS, and ULE.

products.name: Natural ID
products.description: Capacitive-based fingerprint identification products for notebook PCs, PC peripherals, and automobiles.

products.name: DisplayLink
products.description: Video interface solutions for connectivity to external displays with broad protocol and OS compatibility.

products.name: Astra Machina Foundation Series
products.description: Modular development kits supporting SL-Series embedded processors and SR100 Series MCUs for rapid prototyping.

products.name: Automotive Touch and Display
products.description: Integrated touch, display, local dimming, and driver sensing technologies for automotive applications.

products.name: Mobile Touch Solutions
products.description: Advanced touch solutions for smartphones and tablets with OLED support, backed by over 500 touch-related patents.

partnerships.description: Acquired assets and non-exclusive licenses for Wi-Fi technology including Wi-Fi 8, UWB, GPS/GNSS products in January 2025.
